title: carex micrantha
intro: Carex micrantha, also known as dwarf sedge, is a small perennial plant native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues due to its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and aiding in the treatment of urinary tract infections. Carex micrantha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
